summary: Critical failures: (1) Workflow action `actions/checkout@v4` not pinned to full commit SHA as required—must be 40 hex chars with release date. (2) Test harness exit-code capture broken: `act push --rm 2>&1 || echo "ACT_EXIT_CODE=$?"` doesn't get $? from act; should redirect to file instead. (3) No output validation—requirements explicitly demand parsing markdown/JSON output and asserting EXACT VALUES (e.g., status fields, days_until), not just checking exit codes. Tests only grep workflow YAML structure; don't validate secret-rotation-validator.sh results. (4) Manual JSON building in script (output_json, lines 213-220) risks escaping errors; use jq. (5) Shellcheck errors suppressed with `|| true` (line 81). Main script structure is sound, but test harness defeats the purpose of running through act.
